title: ophryosporus galioides
intro: Ophryosporus galioides, also known as the "Galliflower," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophryosporus galioides include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Ophryosporus galioides include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water.
